name: Journal Entry
query:
WITH opening AS (
    SELECT 
        COALESCE(
            SUM(jea.debit_in_account_currency - jea.credit_in_account_currency), 0
        ) AS opening_balance
    FROM `tabJournal Entry Account` jea
    JOIN `tabJournal Entry` je ON je.name = jea.parent
    WHERE
        jea.account = %(account)s
        AND je.posting_date < %(from_date)s
),

main AS (
    SELECT
        je.name AS "Voucher:Link/Journal Entry:120",
        je.posting_date AS "Posting Date:Date:100",

        cash_line.account AS "Cash Account:Link/Account:180",

        -- ⭐ ALL OTHER LINES MERGED AS CSV
        GROUP_CONCAT(
            CONCAT(
                other_line.account,
                IF(other_line.party IS NOT NULL, CONCAT(' (', other_line.party, ')'), ''),
                ' D:', other_line.debit_in_account_currency,
                ' C:', other_line.credit_in_account_currency
            ) SEPARATOR '; '
        ) AS "Counter Details:Data:250",

        je.remark AS "Remark:Data:200",

        CASE je.docstatus
            WHEN 0 THEN 'Draft'
            WHEN 1 THEN 'Submitted'
            WHEN 2 THEN 'Cancelled'
        END AS "Status:Data:90",

        je.custom_payment_type AS "Payment Type:Data:120",

        cash_line.debit_in_account_currency AS "Debit:Currency:120",
        cash_line.credit_in_account_currency AS "Credit:Currency:120",

        -- ⭐ RUNNING BALANCE PER ACCOUNT
        SUM(
            cash_line.debit_in_account_currency
          - cash_line.credit_in_account_currency
        ) OVER (
            PARTITION BY cash_line.account
            ORDER BY je.posting_date, je.name, cash_line.name
        ) AS "Running Balance:Currency:150"

    FROM `tabJournal Entry` AS je
    JOIN `tabJournal Entry Account` AS cash_line
        ON je.name = cash_line.parent
    LEFT JOIN `tabJournal Entry Account` AS other_line
        ON je.name = other_line.parent
        AND other_line.name != cash_line.name

    WHERE
        cash_line.account = %(account)s
        AND je.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
        AND (
        -- If Month is selected → apply month filter
        (
            %(month)s IS NOT NULL AND %(month)s != ''
            
            AND MONTH(je.posting_date) =
                CASE %(month)s
                    WHEN 'January' THEN 1
                    WHEN 'February' THEN 2
                    WHEN 'March' THEN 3
                    WHEN 'April' THEN 4
                    WHEN 'May' THEN 5
                    WHEN 'June' THEN 6
                    WHEN 'July' THEN 7
                    WHEN 'August' THEN 8
                    WHEN 'September' THEN 9
                    WHEN 'October' THEN 10
                    WHEN 'November' THEN 11
                    WHEN 'December' THEN 12
                END
        )

        OR

        -- If Month not selected → use date range
        (
            (%(month)s IS NULL OR %(month)s = '')
            AND (
                (%(from_date)s IS NULL OR je.posting_date >= %(from_date)s)
                AND (%(to_date)s IS NULL OR je.posting_date <= %(to_date)s)
            )
        )
)
        
    GROUP BY
        je.name,
        je.posting_date,
        cash_line.name
)

(
    -- ⭐ OPENING ROW
    SELECT
        "Opening" AS "Voucher:Link/Journal Entry:120",
        %(from_date)s AS "Posting Date:Date:100",
        %(account)s AS "Cash Account:Link/Account:180",
        "" AS "Counter Details:Data:250",
        "Opening Balance" AS "Remark:Data:200",
        "" AS "Status:Data:90",
        "" AS "Payment Type:Data:120",
        0 AS "Debit:Currency:120",
        0 AS "Credit:Currency:120",
        opening_balance AS "Running Balance:Currency:150"
    FROM opening
)

UNION ALL

(
    SELECT * FROM main
)

ORDER BY "Posting Date", "Voucher";
